          It should 8 bytes and the default is “0000000000000000”.

          Attribute: ans..32

          Since:
          V1.14.00

    • Class com.pax.poslink.MultipleCommandsRequest extends BaseRequest<MultipleCommandsRequest> implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • requests

          java.util.ArrayList<E> requests
          The List of Request(PaymentRequest, ManageRequest, BatchRequest, ReportRequest)

    • Class com.pax.poslink.PayloadRequest extends BaseRequest<PayloadRequest> implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • Payload

          java.lang.String Payload
          The data or message to pass through to the terminal. This payload must be in base64 format.

          Attribute: ans...400

    • Class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest extends BaseRequest<PaymentRequest> implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • TenderType

          int TenderType
          Indicate the Tender type.

          ALL = 0
          CREDIT = 1
          DEBIT = 2
          CHECK = 3
          EBT_FOODSTAMP = 4
          EBT_CASHBENEFIT = 5
          GIFT = 6
          LOYALTY = 7
          CASH = 8
          EBT = 9
          CHECKCARDTYPE = 10 (Deprecated since V1.13.00)
          QR_PAYMENT = 11
          PRE_INPUT_ACCOUNT = 12
          An Error will be return while invoking POSLink.ProcessTrans if user set other value.
          User can assign the TenderType by com.PAX.POSLink.PaymentRequest.ParseTenderType or assign an integer directly.
          Example: PaymentRequest payment = new PaymentRequest();
          payment.TenderType = payment.ParseTenderType("CREDIT"); //recommend
          or
          payment.TenderType = 1;
          Note:The Do Credit command is used to execute the credit payment transactions when Auto EDC mode is disabled and will use the credit transaction flow. When Auto EDC is enabled, this command will be executed as do payment without specifying the EDC type, the EDC will be processed based on the card type.

        • TransType

          int TransType
          Indicate the transaction type. An Error will be returned while invoking POSLink.ProcessTrans if user set other value.
          User can assign the TransType by com.PAX.POSLink.PaymentRequest.ParseTransType or assign an integer directly.
          Example:
          PaymentRequest payment = new PaymentRequest();
          payment.TransType = payment.ParseTransType("SALE"); //recommend
          or
          payment.TransType = 1;

          CHECKCARDTYPE(Deprecated since V1.13.00) only support SALE now.

          See PaymentTransType for definition.

          See EDC Supported Trans Type for more detail.

        • Amount

          java.lang.String Amount
          The base amount, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the transaction is LOYALTY, this field is the points, if this field is NULL, terminal will prompt dialog to enter the amount.
          If the terminal is under demo mode, running transactions with special amount will trigger special results.
          Please refer to Special Amount in Demo Mode for more details.

          Attribute: n…9

        • CashBackAmt

          java.lang.String CashBackAmt
          The cash back amount, $$$$$$$CC, if the field is NULL, and the switch on terminal turn on, terminal will prompt dialog to enter it.

          Attribute: n…9

        • ClerkID

          java.lang.String ClerkID
          Employee/clerk id.

          Attribute: ans…8

        • Zip

          java.lang.String Zip
          Cardholder/check owner billing zip/postal code.

          Attribute: ans…9

        • TipAmt

          java.lang.String TipAmt
          Tip amount $$$$$$$CC.

          Attribute: n…9

        • TaxAmt

          java.lang.String TaxAmt
          The tax amount, $$$$$$$CC.
          if the field is NULL, and terminal supports commercial card, terminal will prompt dialog to enter it. it included in transaction amount.

          Attribute: n…9

        • Street

          java.lang.String Street
          Primary billing street address.

          Attribute: ans…32

        • Street2

          java.lang.String Street2
          Backup billing street address.

          Attribute: ans…32

        • SurchargeAmt

          java.lang.String SurchargeAmt
          The merchant surcharge fee, $$$$$$$CC.

          Attribute: n…9

          If the setting in terminal of "merchant fee" is 0, this field must be NULL or 0.
          If the setting in terminal of "merchant fee" is not 0, this field can be exist or NULL, if the value is NULL, terminal will use the default value in terminal.
          Only debit sale and ebt cash benefit sale support it.

        • ServerID

          java.lang.String ServerID
          Deprecated. 
          Server identify .

        • AutoSubmit

          java.lang.String AutoSubmit
          Deprecated. 
          True = on, False = off, anything else = use default setting .

        • PONum

          java.lang.String PONum
          Deprecated. (deprecated since V1.02.00). Please use PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.PONumber

          Attribute: ans…25

          The order number supplied by the merchant.

        • OrigRefNum

          java.lang.String OrigRefNum
          Original terminal reference number used for follow-up transactions.

          Attribute: n…4

        • Misc3Amt

          java.lang.String Misc3Amt
          Deprecated. 
          amount 3 .

          Attribute: n…8

        • Misc2Amt

          java.lang.String Misc2Amt
          Deprecated. 
          amount 2

          Attribute: n…8

        • Misc1Amt

          java.lang.String Misc1Amt
          Deprecated. 
          amount 1

          Attribute: n…8

        • MerchantKey

          java.lang.String MerchantKey
          Deprecated. 
          merchant key

        • InvNum

          java.lang.String InvNum
          POS system invoice/tracking number.

          Attribute: ans…16

        • ECRRefNum

          java.lang.String ECRRefNum
          The ECR reference number, This is an unique code in ECR side.

          Attribute: ans…16

        • ECRTransID

          java.lang.String ECRTransID
          ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side. Please check Host Specific Remarks for details about field attributes.

          Attribute: ans..64

        • OrigECRRefNum

          java.lang.String OrigECRRefNum
          The original ECR reference number, This is an unique code in ECR side.

          Attribute: n..16

        • AuthCode

          java.lang.String AuthCode
          Voice Authorization Code obtained via telephone from the payment host. The transaction type is “FORCED” or “FORCED PRE-AUTH”. This field is NULL and the terminal will prompt for the authorization.

          Attribute: n..10

        • ExtData

          java.lang.String ExtData
          Extended data in XML format

          Example:<TagName>x</TagName>

          Note: refer to XML restriction, the below characters need to escape at first to avoid exception. ‘, “, <, >, &. Should escape as these &quot;, &apos;, &lt;, &gt;, &amp;.

          See PaymentRequest ExtData for definition.

        • FuelAmt

          java.lang.String FuelAmt
          The portion of the transaction amount charged for fuel purchases during fleet transactions.
          This amount is pre-included in the transaction base amount.

          Attribute: n…9

        • ContinuousScreen

          java.lang.String ContinuousScreen
          ‘0’ default.
          ‘1’ after command is executed display doesn't go back to idle screen.

          Attribute: n1

        • ServiceFee

          java.lang.String ServiceFee
          Service Fee for Credit and Debit transactions, $$$$$$$CC.

          Attribute: n..9

        • GiftCardType

          java.lang.String GiftCardType
          The Gift card type.

          Values:
          C - Custom Value Gift Card
          P - Predetermine Value Gift Card
          Applicable for T06 only.

          Attribute: a1

        • CommercialCard

          PaymentRequest.CommercialCard CommercialCard
          Commercial Information. see PaymentRequest.CommercialCard for detail.

        • Restaurant

          Restaurant Restaurant
          Restaurant Information. see Restaurant for detail.
          Since:
          V1.04.00

        • HostGateWay

          PaymentRequest.HostGateWay HostGateWay
          HostGateWay Information. see PaymentRequest.HostGateWay for detail.
          Since:
          V1.04.00

        • TransactionBehavior

          PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior TransactionBehavior
          TransactionBehavior. see PaymentRequest.TransactionBehavior for detail.
          Since:
          V1.04.00

        • Original

          PaymentRequest.Original Original
          Original. see PaymentRequest.Original for detail.
          Since:
          V1.04.00

        • FleetCard

          FleetCardRequest FleetCard
          FleetCard Information. see FleetCardRequest for detail.
          Since:
          V1.04.00

        • MultiMerchant

          MultiMerchant MultiMerchant
          MultiMerchant Information. see MultiMerchant for detail.
          Since:
          V1.04.00

        • LodgingInfo

          PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo LodgingInfo
          Lodging Information. see PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo for detail.
          Since:
          V1.07.00

        • AutoRentalInfo

          PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo AutoRentalInfo
          Auto Rental information. see PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo for detail.
          Since:
          V1.09.00

        • CVVBypassReason

          java.lang.String CVVBypassReason
          The reason the CVV or Gift Card PIN was not provided.

          0: Deliberately Bypassed
          1: Not Available
          2: Illegible

          Attribute: n1

          Since:
          V1.09.00

        • GiftTenderType

          java.lang.String GiftTenderType
          The tender type of the account used to activate or reload the gift card.

          0 = Unknown
          1 = Credit Card
          2 = Debit Card
          3 = Check
          4 = Cash

          Attribute: n1

          Since:
          V1.10.00

        • OrigTraceNum

          java.lang.String OrigTraceNum
          Original trace number which is returned in response host information.

          Attribute: ans...64

          Since:
          V1.09.00

        • HostCredentialInformation

          PaymentRequest.HostCredentialInformation HostCredentialInformation
          Host Credential Information see PaymentRequest.HostCredentialInformation for detail.
          Since:
          V1.10.00

        • PayloadData

          java.lang.String PayloadData
          Host-specific data, formatted according to host specifications.

          ans…4000

          Since:
          V1.13.01

    • Class com.pax.poslink.ReportRequest extends BaseRequest<ReportRequest> implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • TransType

          int TransType
          Indicate the transaction type.

          LOCALTOTALREPORT =1 - used to retrieve the total count and total amount from the terminal via EDC type or card type.
          LOCALDETAILREPORT = 2 - used to retrieve the transaction detail from the terminal.
          LOCALFAILEDREPORT = 3 - Whenever a Settlement is run, there is the possibility that some of the transactions will fail during settlement. Those transactions are saved and their details can be retrieved using this message so that the merchant can directly settle the outstanding transactions with the card processor. If the record has reported, it will not reported again.
          HOSTREPORT = 4 - The ECR/PC should print the return line message "R07". This command is to get the current batch information of host..
          HISTORYREPORT = 5 - get the last batch information.
          SAFSUMMARYREPORT = 6 - This command is to summary report of store and forward (SAF) information.
          HOSTDETAILREPORT = 7 - This command is used to retrieve the transaction information from the host. An Error will be returned while invoking POSLink.ProcessTrans if user set other value.
          User can assign the TransType by com.PAX.POSLink.ReportRequest.ParseTransType or assign an integer directly.
          Example:
          ReportRequest report = new ReportRequest();
          report.TransType = report.ParseTransType("LOCALTOTALREPORT"); //recommend
          or
          report.TransType = 1;

        • EDCType

          int EDCType
          Indicate the EDC type.

          ALL = 0
          CREDIT = 1
          DEBIT = 2
          CHECK = 3
          EBT = 4
          GIFT = 5
          LOYALTY = 6
          CASH = 7
          Only above value accepted, other value will be omitted.
          F EBT includes EBT_FOODSTAMP and EBT_CASHBENEFIT.
          User can assign the EDCType by ReportRequest.ParseEDCType(java.lang.String) or assign an integer directly.
          Example: ReportRequest report = new ReportRequest();
          report.EDCType = report.ParseEDCType("CREDIT"); //recommend
          or
          report.EDCType = 1;

        • CardType

          int CardType
          Indicate the Card type.

          Attribute: n2

          VISA = 1
          MASTERCARD = 2
          AMEX = 3
          DISCOVER = 4
          DINERCLUB = 5
          ENROUTE = 6
          JCB = 7
          REVOLUTIONCARD = 8
          OTHER = 9
          Only above value accepted, other value will be omitted.
          Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT/ LOCALTOTALREPORT
          User can assign the CardType by ReportRequest.ParseCardType(String) or assign an integer directly.
          Example: ReportRequest report = new ReportRequest();
          report.CardType = report.ParseCardType("MASTERCARD"); //recommend
          or
          report.CardType = 2;

        • PaymentType

          int PaymentType
          Indicate the payment type.

          Attribute: n2

          See PaymentTransType for definition. User can assign the PaymentType by ReportRequest.ParsePaymentType(String) or assign an integer directly.
          Example:
          ReportRequest report = new ReportRequest();
          report.PaymentType = report.ParseTransType("ADJUST"); //recommend
          or
          report.PaymentType = 10;

        • RecordNum

          java.lang.String RecordNum
          The log index in terminal.

          Attribute: n…4

          Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

        • RefNum

          java.lang.String RefNum
          Terminal reference number used for follow-up transactions.

          Attribute: n…4

          Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

        • AuthCode

          java.lang.String AuthCode
          Retrieve the transaction record with the matching authorization number.

          Attribute: ans…10

          Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT/HOSTDETAILREPORT

        • ECRRefNum

          java.lang.String ECRRefNum
          Retrieve the transaction record with the merchant reference number.

          Attribute: ans…16

          Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

        • SAFIndicator

          java.lang.String SAFIndicator
          Store and forward transaction report indicator.

          Attribute: n1

          0: New record report 1: Failed record report 2: All (New + Failed report)

          Used only TransType is SAFSUMMARYREPORT

        • ExtData

          java.lang.String ExtData
          Extended data in XML format

          Example:<TagName>x</TagName>

          Note: refer to XML restriction, the below characters need to escape at first to avoid exception. ‘, “, <, >, &. Should escape as these &quot;, &apos;, &lt;, &gt;, &amp;.

          See ReportRequest ExtData for definition.

        • LastTransaction

          java.lang.String LastTransaction
          Retrieve the last transaction details

          Valid value:

          0 = needn't(default value) 1 = need

          Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

        • MultiMerchant

          MultiMerchant MultiMerchant
          MultiMerchant Information. see MultiMerchant for detail.

          Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

          Since:
          V1.04.00

        • ECRTransID

          java.lang.String ECRTransID
          ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side.

          Attribute: ans…64

          Used only TransType is HOSTDETAILREPORT

          Since:
          V1.05.00

        • HRefNum

          java.lang.String HRefNum
          Host reference number (Transaction UID). This field is host dependent; it can be used to run Void/Return transactions.

          Attribute: ans…32

          Used only TransType is HOSTDETAILREPORT

          Since:
          V1.05.00

        • TransactionResultType

          java.lang.String TransactionResultType
          Filter included transaction by Transaction Result.

          Attribute: n1

          0 – Successful transactions only(Default)
          1 – Failed transactions only
          2 – All transactions

          Used only TransType is LOCALDETAILREPORT

          Since:
          V1.13.00
